page = <Page url='http://127.0.0.1:5173/'>

    def test_toggle_persist(page):
        page.goto(BASE_URL)
        checkbox = _item(page, "Buy milk").locator('input[type="checkbox"]')
        checkbox.check()
        expect(checkbox).to_be_checked()
        # Persisted across reload.
        page.goto(BASE_URL)
